center.name: Canning River (Alaska)
center.summary: The Canning River flows through parts of the North Slope in the U.S.

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: While much of the migration is over sea, overland spring migration occurs in the Canning River Valley, Alaska, and overland fall migration occurs from northern Russia to the Persian Gulf among Eurasian populations, and over the Great Lakes (particularly Lake Ontario) among American populations.{{Cite journal |last=Sherony |first=Dominic F
